_meta.source: National Park Service, state summary pages
_meta.notes: Count of National Park Service-managed units per state (all designation types: national parks, monuments, historic sites, seashores, parkways, recreation areas, etc.), not limited to units carrying the literal 'National Park' designation. Every state's nps.gov/state/{code} 'By The Numbers' page carries an identical footnote stating figures are for the fiscal year ended 2020-09-30; it is unclear whether the underlying widget has been refreshed since, so treat as approximate pending verification against NPS's IRMA/Stats portal (irma.nps.gov/STATS). This is a proxy for density of federally-managed outdoor recreation access, and is distinct from env.public_land_pct, which measures overall public land ownership share (BLM, state, tribal, etc.) regardless of recreational development.
